matches.x: CHAPTER XXXVI. Sennacherib invadeth Judah, OW it came to pass in the fourteenth year of king Hezekiah, that Sennacherib king of Assyria came up-against all the defenced cities of Judah, and took them.

CHAPTER XXXVI. Sennacherib invadeth Judah, OW it came to pass in the fourteenth year of king Hezekiah, that Sennacherib king of Assyria came up-against all the defenced cities of Judah, and took them.

matches.lb: Commentary: Kitzur Ba'al HaTurim on Genesis 14:5:1
matches.x: "And on the fourteenth" - in one verse here and in another verse in 2 Kings 18:13 "And in the fourteenth year of King Hezekiah, Sennacherib, king of Assyria, came up." This is to teach you that just as the nations came against Hezekiah and fell into his hand, so did they come against Abraham and fall into his hand.
